# MetroBuild Expo Story Update

Priority order: latest_update.md > platform_specs.txt > visual_rules.json > asset_manifest.json > deprecated_assets.json > brand_brief.md.

Create the current Instagram Story wayfinding image for onsite visitors.

Final destination: Innovation Hall B
Primary line: Keynotes & Live Demos
Date line: Wednesday, September 16
Directional line: Follow the blue path to Level 2
CTA/helper: Scan map for session times

This update replaces old campaign material that mentioned `Main Hall A`, `September 15`, `Smart City Gala`, `Follow sponsor signs`, or `Register now`. Do not use exhibitor sales badges, sponsor-logo-wall art, old logos, or archive claims as active final content.
